name: Frosted Glass Card
description: Frosted glass card with backdrop blur and saturation. Includes border and shadow styling.

name: Cursor Blink
description: Blinking cursor animation keyframes and utility class. Pairs with useTypewriter.

name: Glow Shadow
description: Colored glow shadows with hover animation. Indigo/violet color scheme with hover intensity boost.

name: Noise Overlay
description: Film grain noise overlay using SVG turbulence filter. Add class to any container for texture.

name: Text Gradient
description: Animated gradient text — indigo to violet to cyan. Uses background-clip for text coloring with animated background position.

name: Glitch Effect
description: RGB channel split + clip-path slicing for cyberpunk glitch text effect.

name: Holographic Overlay
description: Rainbow refraction gradient + noise sparkle overlay for trading card holographic effect.

name: Shimmer Loading
description: Animated gradient sweep for skeleton loading placeholders. Dark and light variants.

name: Neon Glow & Scan Line
description: Neon text/box glow with pulse animation and optional CRT scan line overlay.

name: Split-Flap Character
description: 3D flip keyframes and structure for split-flap airport board character display.

name: Stagger Entrance Presets
description: Pre-built staggered entrance animations: slide-up, scale-in, blur-in, flip-in.

name: Iridescent Gradient
description: Thin-film interference rainbow gradient with hue-rotate animation. Text and surface variants.

name: Sticker Peel
description: Corner peel effect with paper fold shadow on hover. Reveals content underneath.
